    MachinePlayer(String nickname, IMachineShotStrategy shotStrategy)
    Creates the machine player with the given nickname and targeting strategy.

  • Uses of IMachineShotStrategy in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.strategy

    Classes in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.strategy that implement IMachineShotStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    RandomHuntStrategy
    Machine shot strategy that combines a pure-random phase with a "hunt & target" phase: Random phase: when there is no active hit being pursued, the strategy picks a random cell that has not been shot at yet. Hunt phase: when the last shot was a CellState.HIT, the strategy enqueues the four orthogonal neighbors of that hit (filtering out out-of-bounds and already-shot cells) and then fires randomly among those candidates.
